mapper.select: /* usimMgmtMapper.getUsimHistList */ SELECT EVNT_SEQ , USIM_NO , TO_CHAR(EVNT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS EVNT_DTTM , DECODE(EVNT_CD, 'I', '등록', 'U', '수정', 'D', '삭제') AS EVNT_NM , ORGN_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_NM , EVNT_REGST_ID FROM MSP_PARTNER_USIM_HIST WHERE USIM_NO = #{usimNo} ORDER BY EVNT_SEQ DESC

SELECT V.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,V.DLVR_DATE AS deliveryDttm ,V.ORDR_SEQ AS orderNum ,V.INTM_MODEL_ID AS usimPrdtId ,UPPER(V.PRDT_CODE) AS usimPrdtCode FROM ( SELECT OOIM.ORGN_ID ,MIDT.DLVR_DATE ,MIDT.ORDR_SEQ ,MIDT.INTM_MODEL_ID ,CIM.PRDT_CODE FROM MDS_INTM_DLVR_TXN MIDT ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM ,CMN_INTM_MDL CIM WHERE MIDT.DLVR_ORG_ID = OOIM.KT_ORG_ID AND MIDT.INTM_MODEL_ID = CIM.PRDT_ID AND MIDT.INTM_SEQ = #{usimNo} AND OOIM.TYPE_CD = '20' AND CIM.PRDT_TYPE_CD ='02' ORDER BY MIDT.ORDR_DATE DESC ) V WHERE ROWNUM = 1
